docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,389.95 FILED BY YU, ZHENGLIN AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, YISHA  A,K.A  GORDON WANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE EXHIBITS RECEIVED FOR TELEPHONE APPEARANCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, ZHENGLIN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ***FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT LISTED*** SERVED JUN-28-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, YISHA  A,K.A  GORDON WANG

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
